headline: Assessing Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) Valuation After TSA Deal And New Detection System Launches
summary: Agilent Technologies (A) stock has been drawing fresh attention after a burst of product and contract news, including new detection systems and a TSA deal related to U.S. World Cup airport security screening. See our latest analysis for Agilent Technologies. Despite the string of product launches and contracts, including the TSA World Cup deal and new UHPLC and mass spectrometry systems, Agilent’s share price has drifted. The 30 day share price return is down 4.57% and the year to date share...
